description_long: This object is a medium-sized hardcover book with a black cover and white text. The front cover displays the author's name, Joana Moll, while the spine and back cover feature additional text, including the book's title. The book's pages are visible along the top and sides, showing a mix of white and off-white paper with some printed text. The cover appears to be made of a matte, slightly textured material, and the book is in good condition with no visible damage. The overall form is rectangular with slightly rounded edges, typical of a standard hardcover book.
description: A black hardcover book with white text, visible pages, and a matte finish. The cover and spine display the title and author's name.
description_view_0: This view shows the book from an angled top perspective, highlighting the spine and the upper edges of the pages, with the title partially visible.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the front cover, clearly displaying the book's title in white text against a black background, and the open pages.
description_view_2: This view shows the back and side of the book, with the pages and the plain back cover visible, lacking any significant text or illustration.
description_view_3: This view presents the back cover with the author's name, Joana Moll, in white text on a black background, and the book's thickness is apparent.
attribute_title_text: The Hidden Life of an Amazon User
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with white text running vertically, including the title and possibly the author's name. The design is simple and lacks decorative elements.
